biological_replicate: murine primary myoblasts isolated from mice
technical_replicate: Each sample was digested and run in technical duplicate.
experimental_design: C2C12 muscle cell differentiation with TNKS1 depletion
we assessed, as a first step, PARylation activity during the differentiation of C2C12 muscle cells
factor_value: we show that Tankyrase1 (TNKS1), a PARylating ART, plays a major role in myogenesis
number_of_fractions: no fractionation or pre-fractionation is described
number_of_biological_replicates: murine primary myoblasts isolated from mice
